question: In Wix, how do you locate and activate the Chat app after accessing the applications list?
answer: Scroll through the available apps list on the left side of the screen to find 'Chat', then click its adjacent 'Open' button to launch the settings panel.
keypoints: A list of available apps appears on the left side of the screen, and the user scrolls to find the 'Chat' app.
The user clicks on the 'Open' button next to the 'Chat' app within the list.

question: In Wix, what fields require input when configuring the Chat app settings?
answer: Enter your desired chat title in the 'CHAT TITLE' text field and your greeting message in the 'CHAT MESSAGE' text field within the chat settings panel.
keypoints: In the chat settings panel that opens, the user types "Message Us" into the text field labeled 'CHAT TITLE'.
The user then types "Ask us any question." into the text field labeled 'CHAT MESSAGE'.

question: In Wix, how do you publish website changes after modifying app configurations?
answer: Click the 'Publish' button in the top-right corner of the interface to apply and activate all recent modifications.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Publish' button located in the top-right corner of the Wix website builder interface.

question: In Wix, what happens when you add the Pricing Plans app to your website?
answer: Selecting the 'Pricing Plans' app from the applications list adds a dedicated page displaying three pricing tiers: Beginner, Pro, and VIP.
keypoints: The user selects the 'Pricing Plans' app from the list of available apps.
The pricing plans page is added to the website, displaying three different pricing options: Beginner, Pro, and VIP.

question: In Wix, how do you set the Pro plan as the default option and finalize pricing configurations?
answer: Click the 'Select' button under the Pro plan to highlight it, then click 'Save' to confirm and apply all pricing plan adjustments.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Select' button under the 'Pro' plan to choose it as the highlighted plan.
The user clicks on the 'Save' button to apply the changes made to the pricing plans.
